title: git status
description: Shows which files are changed, staged, or untracked.
commonMistakes: fatal: not a git repository|Forgetting to save files before checking

title: git add .
description: Stages all changes in the current folder for the next commit.
commonMistakes: Accidentally staging build output|Nothing added to commit (use "git status" to verify)

title: git commit -m "message"
description: Creates a commit with a short message.
commonMistakes: nothing to commit, working tree clean|error: pathspec 'message' did not match (quotes missing)

title: git pull
description: Fetches and merges remote changes into your current branch.
commonMistakes: Your local changes would be overwritten by merge|fatal: could not read from remote repository

title: git push
description: Uploads your local commits to the remote.
commonMistakes: fatal: The current branch has no upstream branch|rejected (non-fast-forward)

title: git clone <url>
description: Downloads a remote repository to your computer.
commonMistakes: fatal: repository '<url>' not found|Permission denied (publickey)

title: git branch
description: Lists local branches and shows the current branch.
commonMistakes: Confusing local vs remote branches|Branch not showing because you are in detached HEAD

title: git log --oneline
description: Shows recent commits in a short list.
commonMistakes: fatal: your current branch has no commits yet|Long output without paging (press q to exit)

title: git diff
description: Shows changes not yet committed.
commonMistakes: No output because changes are staged (use git diff --staged)|Comparing the wrong files or branch

title: git fetch
description: Downloads remote updates without changing your files.
commonMistakes: Assuming fetch updates your working files|fatal: 'origin' does not appear to be a git repository

title: node -v
description: Prints your Node.js version.
commonMistakes: 'node' is not recognized as an internal or external command|Version too old for the project

title: npm -v
description: Prints your npm version.
commonMistakes: 'npm' is not recognized as an internal or external command|Old npm version causing install issues

title: npm install
description: Installs dependencies from package.json.
commonMistakes: ENOENT: no such file or directory, open 'package.json'|ERESOLVE unable to resolve dependency tree

title: npm ci
description: Installs dependencies exactly from package-lock.json for a clean build.
commonMistakes: npm ERR! missing: package-lock.json|npm ERR! EBADPLATFORM

title: npm run dev
description: Runs the dev script from package.json.
commonMistakes: Missing script: "dev"|EADDRINUSE: address already in use

title: npm run build
description: Runs the build script from package.json.
commonMistakes: Missing script: "build"|Type errors during build

title: npm run lint
description: Runs the lint script from package.json.
commonMistakes: Missing script: "lint"|Lint errors fail the command

title: npm start
description: Runs the start script from package.json.
commonMistakes: Missing script: "start"|Server crashes on startup

title: npm test
description: Runs the test script from package.json.
commonMistakes: Missing script: "test"|Tests fail with exit code 1

title: npm cache clean --force
description: Clears npm cache (requires --force).
commonMistakes: npm ERR! code EACCES when cleaning cache|Running without --force does nothing

title: npm cache verify
description: Checks npm cache integrity.
commonMistakes: Cache verification reports corruption|Running in the wrong folder

title: npm ls
description: Lists installed dependencies in this project.
commonMistakes: Missing packages show as UNMET DEPENDENCY|Command output is too long without --depth

title: npx next dev
description: Starts the Next.js dev server with hot reload.
commonMistakes: 'next' is not recognized (missing dependencies)|EADDRINUSE: address already in use

title: npx next dev -p 4000
description: Starts Next.js on a different port.
commonMistakes: Port still in use because old server is running|Firewall blocks local port

title: npx next build
description: Creates a production build of the app.
commonMistakes: Build fails due to type errors|ENOENT when run outside the project folder

title: npx next start
description: Starts the production server after a build.
commonMistakes: Error: Build not found (run next build first)|Port 3000 already in use

title: npx next lint
description: Runs Next.js linting rules.
commonMistakes: ESLint not configured (no lint script)|Lint errors cause non-zero exit code

title: npx next info
description: Prints system and environment info for debugging.
commonMistakes: Command not found because Next.js is not installed|Running outside the project folder

title: Find what is using port 3000
description: Finds which process is using port 3000.
commonMistakes: lsof: command not found|No output because nothing is listening on 3000

title: Stop a process by PID
description: Stops the process that is using the port.
commonMistakes: No such process|Access is denied
